summary: Elric asks his friend, Ezrasu, for a favor and is surprised when Ezrasu confesses her feelings to him. Elric appears taken aback but tries to maintain his composure as they continue their conversation. Meanwhile, the group prepares for their mission, with some members expressing concern about the potential risks.
key_moments: Elric asks Ezrasu for a favor
Ezrasu confesses her feelings to Elric
The group prepares for their mission
